refsect1.title: DESCRIPTION
refsect1.para: LFS-QOL Contributor Tools is a small suite of tools designed to be helpful during various LFS-QOL packaging tasks.
docstubgen is a utility from said suite which generates documentation stubs for packages in XML format suitable for inclusion into LFS-QOL with minor modifications.

listitem.para: is the folder used to generate the package lists, usually a DESTDIR from a package installation

refsect1.title: ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES
refsect1.para: After the initial version of docstubgen was conceived, a number of new features were added in. In order to not break any existing workflows, these features are all guarded behind environment variables.

listitem.para: Enables library documenting. Current mechanism for checking if a file is a library or not checks if the string ".a" or ".so" appears in the filename.
Performs a recursive search on a folder instead of only checking explicitly specified folders.
Disables "no libraries found" and "no binaries found" warnings.
Performs a recursive search on a folder instead of only checking explicitly specified folders.

Performs a binary detection to check if a file is a binary or just some accompanying auxilliary file that randomly got put in the folders. Current mechanism for checking this involves executing the file command on every single file in the folders and checking if the output contains "ELF", "script", or "ar archive".
Only checked together with DOCSTUBGEN_BINARY_DETECT. An explainer for what this variable does is printed out when you execute docstubgen with DOCSTUBGEN_BINARY_DETECT set but this unset.

refsect1.title: AUTHOR
refsect1.para: Written by seal331, also known as Seal Sealy.
